creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-10-01 07:37:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/cursor-crystal-theme Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  New Port: x11-theme/cursor-crystal-theme KDE crystal style cursor theme
  
          The cursor theme based on the KDE crystal theme. This cursor
          is on kde-look.org and distributed with openSUSE (which has
          it as default). The port does install the "blue" theme as
          default (and thus could possibly conflict with future cursor
          ports, no current ports install a default theme).
  
  PR:             ports/116672
  Submitted by:   David Naylor <dragonsa@highveldmail.co.za>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.191     +1 -0      ports/x11-themes/Makefile
  1.1       +47 -0     ports/x11-themes/cursor-crystal-theme/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/cursor-crystal-theme/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-themes/cursor-crystal-theme/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +523 -0    ports/x11-themes/cursor-crystal-theme/pkg-plist (new)
